# My Daily Download

> My Daily Download is a personalized daily email briefing of AI news, tools, and tactics, curated per career vertical and seniority level, with every item citing a real source. It is now part of My AI Skill Tutor (myaiskilltutor.com); new signups start with MAST's free AI-readiness assessment.

## Pages

- [Home](https://mydailydownload.com/): Product overview, how it works, career verticals, pricing (Free $0/mo, Pro $19/mo), FAQ
- [Sample guide](https://mydailydownload.com/sample): Full example of a daily briefing/guide
- [Blog / guides](https://mydailydownload.com/blog): Career-specific AI guides
- [Onboarding](https://mydailydownload.com/onboarding): Subscriber profile setup (career, seniority, delivery time)
- [Contact](https://mydailydownload.com/contact): Support contact (support@mydailydownload.com)
- [Privacy policy](https://mydailydownload.com/privacy)
- [Terms of service](https://mydailydownload.com/terms)
- [Refund policy](https://mydailydownload.com/refunds)
- [Sign in](https://mydailydownload.com/sign-in): Subscriber account access (Clerk)

## Career vertical hubs

Personalized briefing pages per profession:

- [AI for Product Management](https://mydailydownload.com/ai-for/product-management)
- [AI for Marketing](https://mydailydownload.com/ai-for/marketing)
- [AI for Sales](https://mydailydownload.com/ai-for/sales)
- [AI for Operations](https://mydailydownload.com/ai-for/operations)
- [AI for HR & People](https://mydailydownload.com/ai-for/hr-people)
- [AI for Design](https://mydailydownload.com/ai-for/design)
- [AI for Finance](https://mydailydownload.com/ai-for/finance)
- [AI for Engineering](https://mydailydownload.com/ai-for/engineering)
- [AI for Data Science](https://mydailydownload.com/ai-for/data-science)
- [AI for Customer Success](https://mydailydownload.com/ai-for/customer-success)
- [AI for Content Creation](https://mydailydownload.com/ai-for/content-creation)
- [AI for Consulting](https://mydailydownload.com/ai-for/consulting)
- [AI for Legal](https://mydailydownload.com/ai-for/legal)
- [AI for Healthcare](https://mydailydownload.com/ai-for/healthcare)
- [AI for Entrepreneurship](https://mydailydownload.com/ai-for/entrepreneurship)

## Related products

- [My AI Skill Tutor](https://www.myaiskilltutor.com): Parent product. All signup CTAs on this site funnel to MAST's free AI-readiness assessment (0-100 score plus skill-gap report).

## Machine-readable files

- [agents.md](https://mydailydownload.com/agents.md): Agent interaction guide
- [Agent card](https://mydailydownload.com/.well-known/agent-card.json): A2A-style capability manifest
- [AI agent manifest](https://mydailydownload.com/.well-known/ai-agent.json): Guardrails and allowed/disallowed actions
- [Sitemap](https://mydailydownload.com/sitemap.xml)
- [robots.txt](https://mydailydownload.com/robots.txt)
